summary: Iter 56 — New OCR endpoint POST /api/ocr + frontend integration (OCRScanButton in AddCarModal/AddCustomerModal). Backend: 6/6 NEW OCR tests PASS — 401 no-auth, 400 invalid MIME, 413 oversize >10MB, 400 too-small, ruhsat extraction (9/9 fields filled from synthetic JPG in 8.6s), kimlik extraction (5/5 fields filled in 8.7s). Regression: 22/22 PASS (iter50+51+52+55). Total backend = 28/28 PASS. Frontend e2e: Login → quick-add-car triggers AddCarModal → ocr-btn-ruhsat visible w/ text 'Ruhsat Tara' + hidden ocr-input-ruhsat. Customers page → add-customer-btn opens AddCustomerModal (new mode) → ocr-btn-kimlik visible w/ text 'Kimlik Tara'. EDIT existing customer → ocr-btn-kimlik count=0 (correctly hidden via !editingCustomer guard). All visual banners (Turkish copy 'Ruhsat fotoğrafı ile hızlı giriş', 'Kimlik fotoğrafı ile hızlı kayıt') render correctly inside their respective modal tabs.
passed_tests: POST /api/ocr 400 invalid MIME (text/plain rejected with Turkish error)

POST /api/ocr ruhsat — synthetic JPG (1100x700 with Turkish text + visual features) returned all 9/9 expected fields (plaka, marka, model, yil, motor_no, sasi_no, renk, yakit, vites) — ~8.6s LLM round-trip
POST /api/ocr kimlik — synthetic JPG (1000x620 with photo placeholder + Turkish fields) returned all 5/5 fields (ad, soyad, tc_kimlik_no, dogum_tarihi, dogum_yeri) — ~8.7s
Regression iter50 — 12/12 PASS (health, sold-by, batch tx, satis-role 403, perms version, migration idempotency)
Frontend — AddCarModal opens via quick-add-car; Genel Bilgiler tab default; ocr-btn-ruhsat present + visible (text 'Ruhsat Tara')
Frontend — ocr-input-ruhsat hidden file input present (accept=image/jpeg,jpg,png,webp)
Frontend — Banner copy 'Ruhsat fotoğrafı ile hızlı giriş — Plaka, marka, model, yıl, motor/şasi no, renk vb. alanlar otomatik dolar.' rendered
Frontend — AddCustomerModal (NEW mode) shows ocr-btn-kimlik + 'Kimlik fotoğrafı ile hızlı kayıt' banner
Frontend — AddCustomerModal (EDIT mode) HIDES ocr-btn-kimlik (count=0) — !editingCustomer guard works
critical_code_review_comments: routes/ocr.py — clean implementation: MIME whitelist, 10MB cap, min-size guard (1024B), base64 encode → ImageContent → Gemini 2.5 Pro Vision via Emergent universal key. _parse_json_response handles ```json fenced + brace-bounded extraction. Schema-validated response via Pydantic (RuhsatOCRResult/KimlikOCRResult) with all Optional fields ⇒ partial OCR results gracefully degrade to empty strings. session_id uses uuid4 hex ⇒ no LLM session conflicts. 502 returned on LLM failure. No PII logging.

OCRScanButton.jsx — reusable, type-safe, sonner toast for loading/success/error, resets input.value so same file re-pickable, MIME + size pre-flight on client mirrors server. data-testid pattern: ocr-btn-<type> + ocr-input-<type>. Disabled state w/ Loader2 spinner.
AddCustomerModal.jsx:87 — !editingCustomer guard correctly hides OCR banner in edit mode; confirmed via E2E.
AddCarModal.jsx — OCRScanButton rendered above Plaka field inside Genel Bilgiler tab; banner has wrap-friendly layout (flex-wrap).

Minor (non-blocking): api.js ocrAPI.extract sets 60s timeout vs axios default 30s ⇒ good. However note: emergentintegrations LlmChat does NOT stream — measured 8-9s per call in test env. Frontend toast.loading covers UX gap. Could add a hint 'Bu işlem ~10 saniye sürebilir' on first hover/click for power users.

Minor (non-blocking): server.py — ocr_router registered AFTER all other routers (line 83). No conflicts since /api/ocr is unique. Could group with similar 'AI/integration' routers for readability but not required.
Security: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read at module-load via os.environ.get('','') and re-checked at request time (500 if missing) ⇒ defensive. base64 payload stays in-memory only, not persisted.
Pydantic model OCRResponse.raw_response truncated to 500 chars in response ⇒ good (prevents leaking unbounded LLM verbosity into API contract).
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed. Test generates synthetic ruhsat/kimlik JPGs in-memory via PIL (Turkish text on textured backgrounds w/ rectangles, lines, color stripes ⇒ satisfies image_testing.md 'real visual features' rule). No mongo writes from OCR tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 56 ships OCR feature (POST /api/ocr + OCRScanButton). Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter56_ocr.py — 6 tests, runs in ~19s incl. 2 LLM calls (~9s each). Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_iter56_ocr.py -v -s. For frontend selectors: quick-add-car (sidebar) → AddCarModal → ocr-btn-ruhsat (Genel Bilgiler tab). add-customer-btn → AddCustomerModal (new mode) → ocr-btn-kimlik (NOT shown in edit mode). Synthetic JPGs use PIL+DejaVuSans bold font. Gemini 2.5 Pro Vision returns 100% accuracy on these clean synthetic images — real-world phone photos will be noisier; UI handles partial results via filledCount toast. Don't break: !editingCustomer guard in AddCustomerModal:87.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature validated end-to-end; no bugs found.
